scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm --workspace apps/server run dev" "npm --workspace apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --workspace packages/shared-types run build && npm --workspace packages/scraper run build && npm --workspace apps/server run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,magenta "npm --workspace apps/server run start" "npm --workspace apps/web run preview"
scripts.postinstall: echo "Tip: if Playwright asks for browsers, run: npx playwright install chromium"
